purpose: Resolve >=3-point disagreements between R1 and R2 on a3_antiHallucination for explore-propose multi+single. R1 verified function names; R2 only verified file paths.
method: Strict: extract every function/method/type/file name from each output; grep the actual codebase; subtract 3 per fabrication.

a3_antiHallucination.reason: Two fabrications: 'startStreamPump' (actual export is pumpSdkStream in stream-pump.ts), 'getRealExecutorSdkOptions' (actual export is buildSdkBaseOptions in real-executor-sdk-options.ts). Confirms R1's finding; R2 missed because R2 only checked file paths.

All file paths exist; no function/method/type names cited incorrectly. output_c references only RealStageExecutor, doAttempt, executeStage, StageExecutor — all confirmed present in codebase. R1's 7 was a misread (output_c does NOT cite getRealExecutorSdkOptions); R2's 10 is correct; R3 verifies 10.
